ast.target: 编译解析器出错，函数代码：

ast.source: Error on Stream found for HEAD route

ast.source: set-cookie-parser: failed to decode cookie value. Set options.decodeValues=false to disable decoding.

ast.name: error
ast.target: 启动 Slides 网络服务器时出错：

ast.target: 停止 Slides 网络服务器时出错：

ast.name: info
ast.target: 请求已中止 - 无效的 HTTP 版本

ast.name: info
ast.source: request aborted - refusing to accept new requests as server is closing
ast.target: 请求已中止 - 服务器正在关闭，拒绝接受新请求

ast.name: warn
ast.target: reply.then 上出现未处理的拒绝

ast.name: warn
ast.source: response terminated with an error with headers already sent
ast.target: 响应在已发送标头后因错误而终止

ast.name: warn
ast.source: stream payload does not end properly

ast.name: warn
ast.source: response will send, but you shouldn't use res.writeHead in stream mode
ast.target: 响应将发送，但您不应在流模式下使用 res.writeHead

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Trying to send a NotFound error inside a 404 handler. Sending basic 404 response.
ast.target: 尝试在 404 处理程序中发送 NotFound 错误。正在发送基本的 404 响应。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: these parameters are deprecated, see docs for addKeyword
ast.target: 这些参数已弃用，请参阅 addKeyword 的文档

ast.name: warn
ast.source: keywords option as map is deprecated, pass array
ast.target: keywords 选项作为 map 已弃用，请传递数组

ast.name: warn
ast.source: the default handler for 404 did not catch this, this is likely a fastify bug, please report it
ast.target: 404 的默认处理程序未捕获此错误，这很可能是 fastify 的一个 bug，请报告它

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: set-cookie-parser appears to have been called on a request object. It is designed to parse Set-Cookie headers from responses, not Cookie headers from requests. Set the option {silent: true} to suppress this warning.
ast.target: 警告：set-cookie-parser 似乎是在请求对象上调用的。它旨在解析来自响应的 Set-Cookie 标头，而不是来自请求的 Cookie 标头。设置选项 {silent: true} 以抑制此警告。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Unable to set escapeXML.toString (is the Function prototype frozen?)
ast.target: 无法设置 escapeXML.toString（Function 原型是否被冻结？）

ast.name: description
ast.source: A streaming way to send data to a Node.js Worker Thread
ast.target: 一种向 Node.js 工作线程发送数据的流式方式

ast.name: message
ast.source: You are accessing the deprecated "request.connection" property. Use "request.socket" instead.
ast.target: 您正在访问已弃用的 \"request.connection\" 属性。请改用 \"request.socket\"。

ast.name: message
ast.source: You are decorating Request/Reply with a reference type. This reference is shared amongst all requests. Use onRequest hook instead. Property: %s
ast.target: 您正在使用引用类型装饰 Request/Reply。此引用在所有请求之间共享。请改用 onRequest 钩子。属性：%s

ast.name: message
ast.source: You are trying to set a HEAD route using "exposeHeadRoute" route flag when a sibling route is already set. See documentation for more info.
ast.target: 您正在尝试使用 \"exposeHeadRoute\" 路由标志设置 HEAD 路由，但同级路由已设置。有关更多信息，请参阅文档。

ast.name: message
ast.source: You are using route constraints via the route { version: "..." } option, use { constraints: { version: "..." } } option instead.
ast.target: 您正在通过路由 { version: \"...\" } 选项使用路由约束，请改用 { constraints: { version: \"...\" } } 选项。

ast.name: message
ast.source: You are using a custom route versioning strategy via the server { versioning: "..." } option, use { constraints: { version: "..." } } option instead.
ast.target: 您正在通过服务器 { versioning: \"...\" } 选项使用自定义路由版本控制策略，请改用 { constraints: { version: \"...\" } } 选项。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Modifying the "reply.sent" property is deprecated. Use the "reply.hijack()" method instead.
ast.target: 修改 \"reply.sent\" 属性已弃用。请改用 \"reply.hijack()\" 方法。

ast.name: message
ast.source: You are trying to set/access the default route. This property is deprecated. Please, use setNotFoundHandler if you want to custom a 404 handler or the wildcard (*) to match all routes.
ast.target: 您正在尝试设置/访问默认路由。此属性已弃用。如果您想自定义 404 处理程序或使用通配符 (*) 匹配所有路由，请使用 setNotFoundHandler。

ast.name: message
ast.source: The `reply.redirect()` method has a new signature: `reply.redirect(url: string, code?: number)`. It will be enforced in `fastify@v5`
ast.target: `reply.redirect()` 方法有了新的签名：`reply.redirect(url: string, code?: number)`。它将在 `fastify@v5` 中强制执行

ast.name: message
ast.source: The %s plugin being registered mixes async and callback styles, which will result in an error in `fastify@5`
ast.target: 正在注册的 %s 插件混合了异步和回调风格，这将在 `fastify@5` 中导致错误

ast.name: message
ast.source: must be equal to one of the allowed values
